title: nemophila pulchella
intro: Nemophila pulchella, also known as the baby blue eyes, is a delicate annual flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Nemophila pulchella include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
